statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // empty'); ro=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.repo.owner // empty'); rn=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.repo.name // empty'); rh=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.repo.host // empty'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); ctx=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); pr=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.pr.number // empty'); if [ -n "$dir" ]; then if [ "$dir" = "$HOME" ]; then dd="~"; elif [ "${dir#$HOME/}" != "$dir" ]; then rel="${dir#$HOME/}"; dd=$(echo "$rel" | awk -F/ '{ if (NF <= 2) print "~/" $0; else print "~/.../" $(NF-1) "/" $NF }'); else dd=$(echo "$dir" | awk -F/ '{ if (NF <= 3) print $0; else print "/.../" $(NF-1) "/" $NF }'); fi; fi; out="[ $dd ]"; if [ -n "$rh" ]; then case "$rh" in *github*) sym="@" ;; *gitlab*) sym="~" ;; *bitbucket*) sym="b" ;; *) sym="#" ;; esac; out="$out  $sym  $ro/$rn"; fi; if [ -n "$dir" ]; then branch=$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && out="$out  branch:$branch"; fi; if [ -n "$dir" ]; then cd=$(git -C "$dir" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); gd=$(git -C "$dir" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-dir 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$cd" ] && [ -n "$gd" ] && [ "$cd" != "$gd" ]; then out="$out  worktree"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$dir" ]; then p=$(git -C "$dir" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$p" ]; then st=$(echo "$p" | grep -c '^[MADRC]' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); m=$(echo "$p" | grep -c '^.[MD]' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); d=$(echo "$p" | grep -c '^.D' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); u=$(echo "$p" | grep -c '^??' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); sp=""; [ "$st" -gt 0 ] && sp="${sp}+"; [ "$m" -gt 0 ] && sp="${sp}!"; [ "$d" -gt 0 ] && sp="${sp}-"; [ "$u" -gt 0 ] && sp="${sp}?"; [ -n "$sp" ] && out="$out  [$sp]"; fi; fi; [ -n "$pr" ] && out="$out  PR#$pr"; out="$out  >"; right=""; [ -n "$ctx" ] && right="ctx ${ctx}%"; [ -n "$model" ] && right="${right:+$right | }$model"; [ -n "$right" ] && out="$out  |  $right"; echo "$out"
